settings.title: Browser Settings
settings.startupPagePlaceholder: Enter URL or leave blank for new tab
settings.darkModeDesc: Enable dark theme to reduce eye strain
settings.languageDesc: Choose the display language for the browser interface
settings.clearDataConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all history and bookmarks?
settings.extensionsBetaHint: Currently in beta, availability not guaranteed
settings.extensionsSelectDir: Hint: Please select the extension directory containing manifest.json
settings.pageZoomDesc: Adjust the display size of web content
settings.defaultSearchEngineDesc: Select the search engine for address bar and search box
settings.leaveEmptyForNewTab: Leave blank to show new tab
settings.restoreSessionDesc: Automatically restore tabs from last session on startup
settings.incognitoModeDesc: Browse in incognito mode, no history saved
settings.exportBrowserDataDesc: Export bookmarks, history and other data to JSON file
settings.clearBrowserDataDesc: Clear all data including history and bookmarks
settings.exportAiHistoryDesc: Export AI chat history (including thought process and tool calls) to JSON file
settings.modelListDesc: Fetch available model list from API

ai.title: AI Settings
ai.endpointDesc: Configure the base URL for AI API
ai.apiKeyDesc: Your API access key, will be stored securely
ai.requestTypeDesc: Select the API request format type
ai.modelIdDesc: Specify the model name to use
ai.contextSizeDesc: Model context window token count, affects conversation history retention length
ai.requestTimeoutDesc: Maximum time to wait for API response
ai.configureEndpointKey: Please configure endpoint and key first

translation.title: Translation Settings
translation.apiEnabledDesc: Use separate translation API config when enabled, fallback to AI settings when disabled
translation.requestTypeDesc: Select the API request format type
translation.modelIdDesc: Specify the model name to use
translation.targetLanguageDesc: Select the target language for translation
translation.dynamicTranslationDesc: Automatically detect and translate new content after initial translation
translation.streamingTranslationDesc: When enabled, text appears word by word for real-time translation experience
translation.concurrencyEnabledDesc: Split into multiple requests and send them in parallel
translation.concurrencyCountDesc: Number of parallel requests per round
translation.maxTextsPerRequestDesc: Maximum number of text blocks per translation request
translation.maxCharsPerRequestDesc: Maximum total characters per translation request
translation.requestTimeoutDesc: Maximum time to wait for API response

downloads.title: Downloads
downloads.clearAllConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all downloads?

ai.title: Byteiq AI Assistant
ai.placeholder: Ask a question or give a command...
ai.welcome: Hello! I'm Byteiq AI Assistant. I can help you summarize web pages, answer questions, or assist with browsing.

en: Tell me your goal — I'll plan the steps.
Give me a task. I'll handle the busywork.
Drop your request here and I'll get started.
Need a summary, comparison, or translation? Pick one.

ai.systemPrompt: You are a helpful AI assistant. You can help users summarize web content, answer questions, and provide information. Please respond in a clear and concise manner.
ai.noConfig: Please configure AI API in settings first
ai.defaultAskSelection: Please explain and summarize this selected content, and answer the key questions.
ai.modeOutline: Please output a structured outline with key points.
ai.modeCompare: Please perform comparative/aggregate analysis and provide conclusions.
ai.modeTranslatePage: Please translate/localize the content into Chinese, maintaining accuracy and readability.
ai.modeCodeDocs: Please respond in API documentation/code analysis style, providing key interfaces and examples.
ai.modeQa: Please answer user questions based on context, quoting original text when necessary.
ai.confirmPermanentDelete: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this session? This action cannot be undone.

translation.noApiKey: Please configure AI API in settings first
